overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link climbing a steep rock cliff and then traversing a snowy mountain landscape at night. The scene features falling snow, starry skies, and sparse vegetation, with the aurora borealis becoming visible later in the clip.

agents.ego_description: climbing vertically up the rock face using hands and feet to reach the snow-covered ledge above

entered.detail: steep vertical rock wall with rough texture and snow patches
snow-covered cliff edge visible at the top of the climb
dark night sky filled with visible stars and light snowfall

segments.scene_description: Link ascends a steep rock cliff face in a snowy mountain environment at night. The camera follows from behind as he climbs toward a snow-covered ledge above, with starry skies partially visible overhead between the rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain ridge with distant vistas

events.description: character reaches the top of the cliff and transitions from climbing to walking on snow-covered terrain
green aurora borealis becomes visible in the night sky, illuminating the upper atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking across the snowy mountain ridge, occasionally turning to survey the landscape and distant valleys

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered mountain terrain with gentle rolling hills
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the far distance under the starry sky
green glowing northern lights appearing in the night sky
tall frozen grass blades poking through the snow cover

segments.scene_description: After reaching the summit, Link transitions to walking across the open snowy mountain ridge. The landscape features rolling snow-covered slopes, distant mountain ranges, and sparse frozen vegetation. Approximately halfway through this segment, the aurora borealis becomes visible in the night sky, casting a green glow over the scene while the character continues exploring the terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a vertical ascent up a rocky cliff and opens into a vast, luminous mountain plateau at night. It begins by following Link from behind as he climbs a steep rock face toward a snow-covered ledge, with a starry sky glimpsed between the jagged formations. As he reaches the summit, the perspective shifts from the climb to a steady walk across an open snowy ridge characterized by rolling slopes and sparse frozen vegetation. The scene then expands to reveal distant mountain ranges, while the dark night sky gradually transforms as the aurora borealis emerges. This celestial display casts a vibrant green glow over the frozen terrain as the camera continues to track the character's exploration of the wilderness.
